taxonomy: Braconotia rigida is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is native to southern Africa. The classification of Braconotia rigida includes its kingdom as Plantae, and its phylum as Magnoliophyta. Its classification also includes the class Liliopsida and the order Asparagales. Further classification places it in the family Iridaceae, the subfamily Iridoideae, and the tribe Irideae.
